chunks.title: Vision of Summer Fruit
chunks.reason: A distinct prophetic vision introducing the theme of Israel's end.

chunks.title: Judgment on Social Injustice
chunks.reason: A direct address to the oppressors detailing their sins and the coming divine judgment.

chunks.title: Famine for the Word
chunks.reason: A specific oracle describing a spiritual famine where people seek God's word but fail to find it.

chunks.title: Oath of Samaria and Dan
chunks.reason: A concluding statement targeting those who swear by the idols of the northern kingdom.
